task_completion.description: Create a new tiddler titled 'Incident Response Runbook'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler being edited or viewed with the exact title 'Incident Response Runbook'.

task_completion.description: Add tags 'Runbook' and 'Operations' to the tiddler
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the tags 'Runbook' and 'Operations' displayed below the title in the tiddler editor or view.

task_completion.description: Add a custom field 'priority' with the value 'critical'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the field 'priority' with the value 'critical' in the fields section at the bottom of the tiddler editor.

task_completion.description: Include an introductory paragraph explaining the purpose of the runbook
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for introductory text at the beginning of the tiddler body explaining what the runbook is for.

task_completion.description: Include transclusions of the four existing procedure tiddlers in the correct order
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact transclusion syntax `{{Service Health Check Procedure}}`, `{{Database Failover Steps}}`, `{{Notification Escalation Matrix}}`, and `{{Post-Incident Review Template}}` in the tiddler editor, or their rendered content in the view mode, appearing in that specific order.

task_completion.description: Use at least three section headers to organize the transcluded content
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least three wikitext headers (e.g., `! Header` or `!! Header`) in the editor, or large bold header text in the rendered view, organizing the transclusions.

integrity.description: Agent used the TiddlyWiki GUI to create the tiddler
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the TiddlyWiki web interface (e.g., clicking the '+' button, typing in the editor), not terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The TiddlyWiki interface should be visible in a web browser, not a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Agent wrote an original introductory paragraph
integrity.visual_evidence: The introductory paragraph should be a natural explanation of the runbook's purpose, not a direct copy-paste of the task description prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target tiddler must be titled 'Incident Response Runbook'. It must have tags 'Runbook' and 'Operations'. It must have a custom field 'priority' with value 'critical'. The transclusions must be exactly '{{Service Health Check Procedure}}', '{{Database Failover Steps}}', '{{Notification Escalation Matrix}}', and '{{Post-Incident Review Template}}' in that order.
